basic_details.job_title: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow /Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Recruitment 2026: Central University of Rajasthan has released the official notification for 1 Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany or any branch of Life Sciences with ≥ 55% marks or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, and any branch of life science with ≥ 55% or equivalent CGPA with a good academic record from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. Two (2) years of research experience is mandatory for SRF. Candidate should have cleared UGC/CSIR-NET, GATE, or any other national-level exam conducted by national agencies like DBT, DST, ICAR, ICMR, DAE, MHRD, DRDO, IIT, IISER, etc for JRF position. Preference will be given to SRF candidate.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42000 + 10% HRA for SRF or Rs. 37000 + 10% HRA for JRF

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CURAJ Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Details
CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, and any branch of life science with ≥ 55% or equivalent CGPA with a good academic record from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. Two (2) years of research experience is mandatory for SRF. Candidate should have cleared UGC/CSIR-NET, GATE, or any other national-level exam conducted by national agencies like DBT, DST, ICAR, ICMR, DAE, MHRD, DRDO, IIT, IISER, etc for JRF position. Preference will be given to SRF candidate.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Application Fee 2026
CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 42000 + 10% HRA for SRF or Rs. 37000 + 10% HRA for JRF

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CURAJ recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CURAJ Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the SRF/JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Biochemistry, Botany, or any branch of Life Sciences with at least 55% marks or an equivalent CGPA. For SRF, two years of research experience is mandatory, and for JRF, clearing UGC/CSIR-NET, GATE, or equivalent is required.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the SRF/JRF posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 42000 + 10% HRA for the SRF position and Rs. 37000 + 10% HRA for the JRF position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF)/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Central University of Rajasthan located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Rajasthan is located in Ajmer, Rajasthan, with the pincode 305817.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CURAJ/BIOCHEM/DG/ANRF/01.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
